ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KALAW, FERNAN E $2,334.26 PRINCIPAL, $899.81 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,470.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX )
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KALAW, FERNAN E
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED JUL-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KALAW, FERNAN E
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KALAW, FERNAN E DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2008
